final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a tech-forward e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a bold, hierarchy-driven layout — exact framing and arrangement are yours
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 brand identity and 618 anniversary sale as the focal theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a festive tech-campaign atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs an energetic, celebratory mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 绿联 brand and 618 promotional energy — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, primary), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: 
Avoid:
